title: eriogonum thymoides
intro: Eriogonum thymoides, also known as desert trumpet or desert buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum thymoides include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as promoting wound healing and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Eriogonum thymoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
